text.title: Bug Report Quality Rubric Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema that the rubric scorer must emit. Defines the rubric verdict shape, per-dimension scores, and field-level repair pointers.

section.title: JSON Schema

example.note: Verdict "accept" with score 35 is impossible — threshold is 70. Missing version, last_reviewed, is_ai_feature. field_fixes empty despite zero evidence.
